task_completion.description: Verify that the 6 required columns are added to the spreadsheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for new column headers: 'Days Supply', 'Refill Due Date', 'Insurance Allows Refill', 'Days Until Can Refill', 'Days Until Out', and 'ACTION NEEDED'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Days Supply column is correctly calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Days Supply column containing the correct values based on Qty/Dosage: 30 (Lisinopril), 90 (Metformin), 90 (Atorvastatin), 90 (Levothyroxine), 60 (Omeprazole).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Refill Due Date and Insurance Allows Refill columns contain calculated dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for date values (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD or MM/DD/YY) in the 'Refill Due Date' and 'Insurance Allows Refill' columns.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Days Until Can Refill and Days Until Out columns contain numerical values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for numerical values (positive or negative integers) in the 'Days Until Can Refill' and 'Days Until Out' columns.

task_completion.description: Verify that the ACTION NEEDED column is populated and conditional formatting is applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text flags in the 'ACTION NEEDED' column and observe cells or rows colored Red (for urgent) or Yellow (for this week).

task_completion.description: Verify that the spreadsheet is sorted by urgency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Days Until Out' column to ensure the numbers are sorted in ascending order (smallest/most negative numbers at the top).

task_completion.description: Verify that the file is saved in ODS format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the LibreOffice Calc window title bar or a save dialog to confirm the file is named with an '.ods' extension (e.g., medication_refill_schedule.ods).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the LibreOffice Calc GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the LibreOffice Calc application window, clicking menus, cells, and using the formula bar.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use a terminal script to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show execution of Python or bash scripts that directly manipulate the CSV/ODS file to calculate values or apply formatting.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually entered formulas rather than hardcoding values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent typing formulas starting with '=' (e.g., '=D2/E2', '=C2+F2') in the formula bar instead of typing raw numbers or dates.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Medications: Lisinopril 10mg, Metformin 500mg, Atorvastatin 20mg, Levothyroxine 50mcg, Omeprazole 20mg.
Expected Days Supply: Lisinopril=30, Metformin=90 (180 qty / 2 daily), Atorvastatin=90, Levothyroxine=90, Omeprazole=60.
Formulas: Days Supply = Qty/Dosage; Refill Due = LastRefill+DaysSupply; Insurance Allows = LastRefill+(0.75*DaysSupply); Days Until Can Refill = InsuranceDate-TODAY(); Days Until Out = DueDate-TODAY().
Conditional formatting: Red for URGENT, Yellow for This Week.
Sorting: Ascending order by Days Until Out.
